NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT RENTAL CAR FINANCE CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Plaintiff And Request For Sanctions is Denied as moot in light of Plaintiff's recent production. Request for sanctions is denied because it is not supported by evidence establishing time spent on or hour rate. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Not reported = (301/EHG)
